description_for_human: Texas real estate investment analysis platform with automatic listing ingestion and 7 investment strategies.
description_for_model: LockBoxIQ is a real estate investment analysis platform focused on Texas markets (primarily DFW). It ingests property listings from Zillow, Redfin, and Realtor.com email alerts, then analyzes each property across 7 investment strategies (Buy & Hold, Fix & Flip, BRRRR, STR, Wholesale, Commercial, Syndication) with full IRS Schedule E tax modeling including all 16 expense categories, cost segregation, bonus depreciation, and passive activity loss rules. Data sources include Zillow ZHVI/ZORI, U.S. Census Bureau ACS, NCES school ratings, FBI crime data, and Claude AI for parsing. The platform does not currently have a public API but plans to offer MCP server access in the future.
